name: Pokémon TF (Alt Start)
description:
You have been captured and transformed into a pokémon. Now you are locked in a cell and forced to take part in a Pokémon breeding experiment.

PLEASE READ

ALT VERSION: This bot Is the same as the original, however there is nothing in the description or intro describing {{User}}. Meaning you can use your own characters or describe your own appearance how you want.

Click here to check out the original!

The same rule of thumb with these bots, if it starts talking for you, REFRESH! If you let it start talking for you it will get into a bad habit, but I'm sure you knew that already.

CONTENT WARNING: This bot may contain themes of forced or slightly less than ethical sex... but what did you expect? If you don't want it, just burn the place to the ground, you're a freekin Pokémon! But please tell me how much you made these terrible, terrible people pay. Also slightly NSFW intro.

Let me know about any issues or problems so I can fix them. And have fun!

Other themes: TF, transformation, gender bend, genderbending, gender bending, corruption, heat, forced fun, breeding.
creator: Zennex
